contexts.context: …There was a lot of discussion about what an <mark>“average”</mark> user is. I think this also an important topic…
…We’re all users, I don’t know what the <mark>average</mark> user is.
…that we lack is compelling examples of why your <mark>average</mark> user, not your deep user, would want…
…number generator and you want to work out the <mark>average</mark>, you’d have to hand code that. But you…
